test_title: impression beacon se envía al mostrar el overlay
suite_title: Pause Ad VAST — Beacons de tracking
error_message:
expect(received).toBeGreaterThanOrEqual(expected)

Expected: >= 1
Received:    0

Call Log:
- Timeout 10000ms exceeded while waiting on the predicate
root_cause: The impression beacon (track/pausead-impression) is fired by firePauseAdTrackingPixel() inside the pauseAd Jotai atom, which lives exclusively on feature/issue-586-pausead-implementation. The develop build has no pauseAd state machine, so no VAST fetch occurs on pause and no beacon is ever fired.
suspected_cause: Test intercepts impression beacon URL and expects at least 1 hit; the atom that triggers the beacon (pauseAdTrackImpressionAtom) does not exist in the deployed develop player.
